narrative:
Brown Twp (precinct in Paulding County) has 1,196 registered voters, with 56.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.9 percentage points.
